data.title: Christina L. Kushnir, MD, MPH, FACOG named Pinnacle Professional Member in The Inner Circle for Women's Health.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, in Las Vegas, Dr. Christina L. Kushnir, MD, MPH, FACOG was recognized in The Inner Circle as a distinguished Pinnacle Professional Member for her outstanding leadership in Women's Health and Medical Training. Dr. Kushnir has been acknowledged for her significant contributions to the field.

The newly elected officers will lead the organization in its mission...

data.title: Chemung Financial Corp. (Nasdaq: CHMG) reports $6.5M loss in Q2 2025, compared to $6.0M income in Q1 2025 and $5.0M income in Q2 2024.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, in Elmira, N.Y., Chemung Financial Corporation, the parent company of Chemung Canal Trust Company, announced a quarterly financial update. They reported a net loss of $6.5 million, equivalent to $1.35 per share, for the second quarter of 2025. This contrasts with the net income figures of $6.0 million ($1.26/share) in the first quarter of 2025 and $5.0 million ($1.05/share) in the second quarter of 2024. The corporation's stock is listed as Nasdaq: CHMG.

data.title: Netflix's Q2 revenue reaches $11.08B, up 16% YoY. Earnings per share at $7.19. UCAN region leads revenue growth at 15%.
data.description: Netflix Inc (NASDAQ: NFLX) announced its second-quarter financial results after the market closed. The company reported revenue of $11.08 billion, marking a 16% increase compared to the previous year and surpassing the estimated $11.04 billion. Earnings per share for the quarter were $7.19, exceeding the consensus estimate of $7.06. Operating margins stood at 34%, higher than the company's own projection. Netflix credited the growth in revenue and margins to an increase in members, higher pricing, and rising advertising revenue. Revenue growth was witnessed across all regions: UCAN reported $4.93 billion (+15%), EMEA $3.54 billion (+18%), LATAM $1.31 billion (+9%), and APAC $1.31 billion (+24%). The UCAN region's 15% growth outperformed the 9% growth in the previous period.

data.title: Weis Markets declares $0.34/share quarterly dividend; record date July 28, 2025; payable on August 11, 2025.
data.description: The Board of Directors of Weis Markets, Inc. (NYSE: WMK) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.34 per share on July 17, 2025. Shareholders as of July 28, 2025, will receive the dividend on August 11, 2025. Weis Markets, established in 1912, is a renowned company in the industry.

data.title: Dynamite Blockchain plans private placement to raise capital for digital asset strategy development.
data.description: The organization plans to secure funding in order to advance its strategy focused on digital assets with utility. The company is aiming to raise a significant amount of capital to support the development of this initiative.

data.title: New ChatGPT Agent by OpenAI offers advanced capabilities but raises concerns due to heightened risks.
data.description: OpenAI has developed a new ChatGPT Agent capable of performing intricate tasks for users, offering enhanced functionalities. However, this advancement also poses increased potential risks.

data.title: USA Compression Partners declares $0.525 per common unit distribution for Q2 2025; Earnings release on August 6.
data.description: USA Compression Partners, LP revealed a cash distribution of $0.525 per common unit ($2.10 annually) for Q2 2025. This distribution is scheduled for payment on August 8, 2025, to unitholders recorded by the end of business on July 28, 2025. For its second quarter, USA Compression will announce financial results before the opening of U.S. financial markets.

data.title: CMB.TECH announces progress on stock-for-stock merger with Golden Ocean Group Limited.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, CMB.TECH NV (traded as CMBT on NYSE and Euronext Brussels) shared an update on the stock-for-stock merger with Golden Ocean Group Limited (traded as GOGL on NASDAQ and Euronext Oslo Børs). This merger aims to combine the two companies' strengths and assets.

data.title: Choice Properties Real Estate Investment Trust (CHP.UN) reports financial results for the six months ended June 30, 2025. Visit www.choicereit.ca for the report.
data.description: In Toronto, Choice Properties Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: CHP.UN) disclosed its financial results for the three and six months concluding on June 30, 2025. The 2025 Second Quarter Report can be accessed on the Investors section of the company's website, www.choicereit.ca, and has been submitted on SEDAR+ at www.sedarplus.ca. The Trust reported a robust quarter, showcasing the durability of its portfolio.

data.title: Albany International to release Q2 results on July 30, 2025, with webcast on July 31 at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Listen at investors.albint.com.
data.description: Albany International Corp. (NYSE: AIN) is set to announce its second-quarter 2025 results on July 30, 2025, post-market closure. Following this, a webcast discussing the outcomes is scheduled for July 31, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Stakeholders can tune in to the live webcast through the Company’s Investor Relations website at investors.albint.com. To join the call, interested individuals should register via the provided web link.
